title: Advance Tax on Imports
notes: Part II of 12th Schedule: 2% (3.5% for commercial importers)
Part III of 12th Schedule: 5.5% (6% for commercial importers)
White Sugar (commercial import): 0.25% (as per Second Schedule)
reference: Part-II of First Schedule, 12th Schedule, Second Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Directorship Fee or Board Meeting Fee
notes: Tax deducted on gross amount payable for attending board meetings or directorship fee.
reference: Section 149(3) & Tenth Schedule

title: Tax on Dividends
notes: Mutual funds deriving 50%+ income from profit on debt: 25%
Dividend received by a company from exempt company: 25%
reference: Div I, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Yield or Profit on Debt
reference: Div IA, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Gain on Disposal of Debt Securities
notes: Deducted by custodian on gross amount of capital gain.
reference: Div IIIAA, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Royalty, Tech Services, Contracts, Ads
notes: Capital gain on debt instruments via SCRA (152(1D)): 10%
reference: Div IV, Part I and Div II, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Payment for Sale of Goods
notes: Rice, cotton seed oil, edible oils: 1.5%
FMCG, fertilizer, electronics, sugar, cement, steel, edible oil distributors/dealers (ATL only): 0.25%
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Second Schedule

title: Payment for Services
notes: Transport, freight, hotel, software, IT, tracking, etc.: 6%
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Second Schedule

title: Execution of Contracts
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule

title: Digital Transactions in E-commerce
notes: Digital means / banking channels by payment intermediary: 1%
Cash on Delivery by courier service: 2%
reference: Div IVA, Part I of First Schedule

title: Export of Goods
reference: Div IV, Part III of First Schedule

title: Export of Services
reference: Div IVA, Part III of First Schedule

title: Rent of Immovable Property
notes: Individuals/AOPs: 0% up to Rs 300,000; 5% to 35% slab rates above Rs 300,000.
reference: Div V, Part III of First Schedule

title: Prizes and Winnings
reference: Div VI, Part III of First Schedule

title: Sale of Petroleum Products
notes: Collected on the amount of commission or discount allowed to petrol pump operators.
reference: Div VIA, Part III of First Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Cash Withdrawal
notes: Applicable only to persons NOT appearing in the active taxpayers' list on aggregate daily withdrawals exceeding Rs. 50,000.
reference: Section 231AB

title: Purchase, Registration and Transfer of Motor Vehicles
notes: Transfer: Fixed amount based on engine capacity.
Non-ATL rate is increased by 200% (i.e. effectively 3 times the ATL rate) for registration/purchase.
reference: Div VII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance tax on foreign domestic workers
notes: Collected by authority issuing/renewing domestic aide visa.
reference: Section 231C

title: Brokerage and Commission
reference: Div II, Part IV of First Schedule

title: Tax on Motor Vehicles
notes: Private vehicles: Fixed rates varying by CC (Rs 800 to Rs 120,000).
reference: Div III, Part IV of First Schedule

title: Electricity Consumption
notes: Domestic: 0% below 25k, 7.5% for 25k or more (does not apply if on ATL).
reference: Div IV, Part IV of First Schedule

title: Telephone and Internet Users
reference: Div V, Part IV of First Schedule

title: Sale by Auction
notes: Immovable property & train management services auction: 5%
reference: Div VIII, Part IV of First Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Sale/Transfer of Immovable Property
notes: Fixed at 11.5% for all tiers if not on ATL (as per Tenth Sched Table).
reference: Div X, Part IV of First Sched & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance Tax on TV Plays and Advertisements
notes: Foreign drama serial: Rs 1,000,000 per episode.
Ad starring foreign actor: Rs 100,000 per second.
reference: Div XA, Part IV of First Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Functions and Gatherings
notes: Collected from person arranging functions in marriage halls, hotels, marquees, clubs, etc.
reference: Div XI, Part IV of First Schedule

title: Sale to Distributors, Dealers or Wholesalers
notes: Fertilizer: 0.7% (Reduced to 0.25% if on ATL for both Income & Sales tax).
Fixed at 2% for non-ATL for other than fertilizer (as per Tenth Sched Table).
reference: Div XIV, Part IV of First Sched & Tenth Schedule

title: Sale to Retailers
reference: Div XV, Part IV of First Sched & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Purchase of Immovable Property
notes: Higher specific rates for non-ATL and Late Filers (Tenth Schedule).
reference: Div XVIII, Part IV of First Sched & Tenth Schedule

title: Remittance abroad via Credit/Debit/Prepaid cards
notes: Collected at the time of transfer of any sum remitted outside Pakistan.
reference: Div XXVII, Part IV of First Schedule

title: Bonus Shares Issued by Companies
notes: Company to withhold 10% of bonus shares and collect tax equal to 10% of their value.
reference: Section 236Z & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Imports
notes: Part II of 12th Schedule: 2% (3.5% for commercial importers)
Part III of 12th Schedule: 5.5% (6% for commercial importers)
White Sugar (commercial import): 0.25% (as per Second Schedule)
reference: Part-II of First Schedule, 12th Schedule, Second Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Tax on Salary
notes: Deducted at the average rate of tax computed at the slab rates specified in Division I of Part I of the First Schedule.
Tenth Schedule (100% increase for non-ATL) does not apply to regular salary.
reference: Section 149(1), Div I, Part I of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(a)

title: Directorship Fee or Board Meeting Fee
notes: Tax deducted on gross amount payable for attending board meetings or directorship fee.
reference: Section 149(3) & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(a)

title: Tax on Dividends
notes: Mutual funds deriving 50%+ income from profit on debt: 25%
Dividend received by a company from exempt company: 25%
Dividend received by REIT Scheme from Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV): 0%
Dividend received by others from SPV: 35%
Other standard cases (including normal mutual funds and REITs): 15%
reference: Div I, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Yield or Profit on Debt
reference: Div IA, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Gain on Disposal of Debt Securities
notes: Deducted by custodian on gross amount of capital gain.
reference: Div IIIAA, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Royalty, Tech Services, Contracts, Ads
notes: Capital gain on debt instruments via SCRA (152(1D)): 10%
Most non-resident payments are exempt from Tenth Schedule 100% penalty unless explicitly included.
reference: Div IV, Part I and Div II, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Payment for Sale of Goods
notes: Rice, cotton seed oil, edible oils: 1.5%
FMCG, fertilizer, electronics, sugar, cement, steel, edible oil distributors/dealers (ATL only via 2nd Sched): 0.25%
Pharma distributors, Gold/Silver trade, Export sectors (2nd Sched): 1%
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Second Schedule

title: Payment for Services
notes: Transport, freight, courier, manpower, hotel, security, tracking, advertising (non-media), car rental, building maintenance, PMEX/PSX services: 3%
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Second Schedule

title: Execution of Contracts
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule

title: Payments by Exporters / Export Houses
notes: Services of stitching, dying, printing, embroidery, washing, sizing, weaving.
reference: Div IV, Part III of First Schedule

title: Digital Transactions in E-commerce
notes: Digital means / banking channels by payment intermediary: 1%
Cash on Delivery by courier service: 2%
reference: Div IVA, Part I of First Schedule

title: Export of Goods
notes: Tenth Schedule does not apply to 154.
reference: Div IV, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(c)

title: Export of Services
notes: Tenth Schedule does not apply to 154A.
reference: Div IVA, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(ca)
